name: weaviate
description: Browse Weaviate schema, run GraphQL queries, and read or create objects in a Weaviate cluster

envVars.name: WEAVIATE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Weaviate cluster API key (sent as Authorization: Bearer)

tools.name: Get Schema
tools.description: List all collections (classes) and their property definitions

clusterHost.description: Weaviate cluster REST endpoint host, e.g. my-cluster-abc123.weaviate.cloud

historicalSummary.omitted: property definitions, module configs, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Run GraphQL Query
tools.description: Run a GraphQL query against the cluster (Get, Aggregate, Explore — including nearText/nearVector search)

clusterHost.description: Weaviate cluster REST endpoint host, e.g. my-cluster-abc123.weaviate.cloud

query.description: GraphQL query, e.g. { Get { Article(limit: 5) { title url } } }

tools.name: List Objects
tools.description: List objects, optionally filtered to one collection (class)

clusterHost.description: Weaviate cluster REST endpoint host, e.g. my-cluster-abc123.weaviate.cloud

class.description: Only return objects of this collection (class), e.g. Article

include.description: Extra properties to include, e.g. vector or classification

tools.name: Get Object
tools.description: Get a single object by collection (class) and ID

clusterHost.description: Weaviate cluster REST endpoint host, e.g. my-cluster-abc123.weaviate.cloud

tools.name: Create Object
tools.description: Create a new object in a collection (class)

clusterHost.description: Weaviate cluster REST endpoint host, e.g. my-cluster-abc123.weaviate.cloud

class.description: Collection (class) name the object belongs to, e.g. Article

properties.description: Object properties matching the collection schema, e.g. {"title":"Hello","url":"https://..."}

id.description: Optional UUID for the object (generated if omitted)

vector.description: Optional vector values (omit when the collection has a vectorizer configured)

prompts.title: Explore my schema
prompts.prompt: Get my Weaviate schema and summarize the collections, their properties, and vectorizers.

prompts.title: Semantic search
prompts.prompt: Run a Weaviate GraphQL nearText query against a collection I specify and summarize the top results.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Weaviate Cloud Setup

steps.title: Create a Weaviate Cloud account
steps.description: Sign up at https://console.weaviate.cloud — free 14-day sandbox clusters are available for testing. Self-hosted Weaviate with API-key auth enabled works too.

steps.title: Create a cluster and grab credentials
steps.description: Create a cluster, then open Cluster details to copy the REST endpoint URL and an API key (use a read-write key for object creation). The key is only displayed once.

steps.title: Store the key and note your host
steps.description: Add WEAVIATE_API_KEY=... to your .env file. Tools take the cluster host (without https://) as the clusterHost parameter, e.g. my-cluster-abc123.weaviate.cloud.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the Get Schema tool with your clusterHost.

notes: Every tool needs the clusterHost parameter — there is no global Weaviate API host
nearText GraphQL queries require a vectorizer module configured on the collection (and possibly a model-provider API key set on the cluster)
Admin keys can read and write; read-only keys will get 403 on Create Object
